query:
SELECT st.id, st.name, st.type, st.targetCount, COUNT(q.id) as preguntas
FROM survey_templates st
LEFT JOIN questions q ON q.templateId = st.id
WHERE st.isActive = 1
GROUP BY st.id, st.name, st.type, st.targetCount
ORDER BY st.id;
